#  Search for Specifications (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Specifications tool.
  * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
Navigate to the **Specifications** tool from your Android device.
### Search for a division
  1. Tap **Search** ![Icon Search Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a1567256d48c74dc58bb9c7434e387f/a8d92f24d7f05df73dfd626cc536b400/icon-search-android.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Specifications Android Search Specification Divisions](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/98f835b90bbda5ec640674cdba87f1dd/ea9f7b1d697da643c4b7ec8974414644/specifications-android-search-specification-divisions.png?fm=webp)
  2. Type a keyword or phrase into the search bar.
  3. Tap the division to view its specification sections.


### Search for a section within a division
  1. Tap the division you for which you want to search specification sections.
  2. Tap **Search** ![Icon Search Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a1567256d48c74dc58bb9c7434e387f/a8d92f24d7f05df73dfd626cc536b400/icon-search-android.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Specifications Android Search Specification Sections](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a9ef50c22f0eb3a859c16bdb863adf28/44afc9e1a170a523477069c492f9abf0/specifications-android-search-specification-sections.png?fm=webp)
  3. Type a keyword or phrase into the search bar.
  4. Tap a specification section to view its details.​


## See Also
  * [Email Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/email-specifications-android)
  * [Search Contextually within Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/search-contextually-within-specifications-android)
  * [View Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/view-specifications-android)
title: Search for Specifications (Android)
description: How to search for and find specifications sections with the Specifications tool from your Android mobile device.
